reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Es un poco antigua. Faltaría remodelar un poco. Pero la atención es muy buena y se puede comer en el serví compras platos variados

(Translated by Google)
It's a bit old. It could use some remodeling. But the service is very good and you can eat in the drive-thru; they have a variety of dishes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwMTVuV1FBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre hago un alto alli. Y me siento muy bienLa ultima vez tuve problema técnico para pagar con billetera virtual. El empleado jovencito de 10. Pero su compañero se puso de mal humor. Lastima q me entere despues que me fui de su fea actitud, con su compañero playero. 28/8 t.t.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop there. And I feel very comfortable. The last time I had a technical problem paying with my digital wallet. The young employee was great. But his coworker got in a bad mood. It's a shame I only found out about his bad attitude towards his fellow attendant after I left. 28/8 t.t.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwMThxNGVREAE
